Query.SQL: SELECT C.CASE_NUMBER AS "C.ENFORCEMENT_NUMBER", C.CASE_NUMBER AS "C.CASE_NUMBER", C.STATUS AS "C.CASE_STATUS", 'CASE' AS "C.ENFORCEMENT_TYPE", C.ADMIN_CRT_CODE AS "C.COURT_CODE", CT.NAME AS "C.COURT_NAME", NULL AS "C.PRE_ISSUE_BALANCE", 0 AS "C.NO_EVENTS", NULL AS "C.WARRANT_ID", NULL AS "C.WARRANT_TYPE", NULL AS "C.DEBT", NULL AS "C.WARRANT_EXECUTING_COURT", NULL AS "C.WARRANT_ISSUING_COURT", NULL AS "C.CO_TYPE" FROM CASES C, COURTS CT WHERE C.CASE_NUMBER = ${param.caseNumber} AND CT.CODE = C.ADMIN_CRT_CODE

SELECT P.PERSON_REQUESTED_NAME AS "C.PARTY_NAME", CPR.PARTY_ROLE_CODE AS "C.PARTY_ROLE", CPR.CASE_PARTY_NO AS "C.PARTY_NUMBER", P.DX_NUMBER AS "C.DX_NUMBER", P.PARTY_ID AS "C.PARTY_ID", CPR.REFERENCE AS "C.REFERENCE", CPR.PAYEE_FLAG AS "C.PAYEE_FLAG", CP.CODE AS "C.PARTY_CODE" FROM PARTIES P, CASE_PARTY_ROLES CPR, CODED_PARTIES CP WHERE CPR.CASE_NUMBER = ${C.ENFORCEMENT_NUMBER} AND CPR.PARTY_ROLE_CODE != 'SOLICITOR' AND P.PARTY_ID = CPR.PARTY_ID AND CP.PARTY_ID (+) = P.PARTY_ID UNION SELECT P.PERSON_REQUESTED_NAME AS "C.PARTY_NAME", CPR.PARTY_ROLE_CODE AS "C.PARTY_ROLE", CPR.CASE_PARTY_NO AS "C.PARTY_NUMBER", P.DX_NUMBER AS "C.DX_NUMBER", P.PARTY_ID AS "C.PARTY_ID", CPR2CPR.PERSONAL_REFERENCE AS "C.REFERENCE", CPR.PAYEE_FLAG AS "C.PAYEE_FLAG", CP.CODE AS "C.PARTY_CODE" FROM PARTIES P, CASE_PARTY_ROLES CPR, CPR_TO_CPR_RELATIONSHIP CPR2CPR, CODED_PARTIES CP WHERE CPR.CASE_NUMBER = ${C.ENFORCEMENT_NUMBER} AND CPR.PARTY_ROLE_CODE = 'SOLICITOR' AND P.PARTY_ID = CPR.PARTY_ID AND CPR2CPR.CPR_B_CASE_NUMBER = CPR.CASE_NUMBER AND CPR2CPR.CPR_B_PARTY_ROLE_CODE = CPR.PARTY_ROLE_CODE AND CPR2CPR.CPR_B_CASE_PARTY_NO = CPR.CASE_PARTY_NO AND CPR2CPR.CPR_A_CASE_PARTY_NO = 1 AND CPR2CPR.CPR_A_PARTY_ROLE_CODE = 'CLAIMANT' AND NVL(CPR2CPR.DELETED_FLAG,'N') = 'N' AND CP.PARTY_ID (+) = P.PARTY_ID ORDER BY "C.PARTY_NUMBER"

SELECT G.ADDRESS_LINE1 AS "C.PARTY_ADDR1", G.ADDRESS_LINE2 AS "C.PARTY_ADDR2", G.ADDRESS_LINE3 AS "C.PARTY_ADDR3", G.ADDRESS_LINE4 AS "C.PARTY_ADDR4", G.ADDRESS_LINE5 AS "C.PARTY_ADDR5", G.POSTCODE AS "C.PARTY_POSTCODE" FROM CASE_PARTY_ROLES CPR, GIVEN_ADDRESSES G WHERE CPR.CASE_NUMBER = ${C.ENFORCEMENT_NUMBER} AND CPR.PARTY_ID = ${C.PARTY_ID} AND G.PARTY_ROLE_CODE = CPR.PARTY_ROLE_CODE AND G.CASE_PARTY_NO = CPR.CASE_PARTY_NO AND G.CASE_NUMBER = CPR.CASE_NUMBER AND (G.ADDRESS_TYPE_CODE = 'SERVICE' OR G.ADDRESS_TYPE_CODE = 'SOLICITOR') AND G.VALID_TO IS NULL UNION SELECT G.ADDRESS_LINE1 AS "C.PARTY_ADDR1", G.ADDRESS_LINE2 AS "C.PARTY_ADDR2", G.ADDRESS_LINE3 AS "C.PARTY_ADDR3", G.ADDRESS_LINE4 AS "C.PARTY_ADDR4", G.ADDRESS_LINE5 AS "C.PARTY_ADDR5", G.POSTCODE AS "C.PARTY_POSTCODE" FROM GIVEN_ADDRESSES G WHERE G.PARTY_ID = ${C.PARTY_ID} AND G.ADDRESS_TYPE_CODE = 'CODED PARTY' AND G.VALID_TO IS NULL
SELECT COUNT(*) AS "C.CO_INFO" FROM CASE_EVENTS CE WHERE CE.CASE_NUMBER = ${C.CASE_NUMBER} AND CE.STD_EVENT_ID = 705 AND CE.DELETED_FLAG != 'Y' AND ROWNUM = 1

SELECT COALESCE(C.TOTAL, 0) - COALESCE( ( SELECT SUM(PY.AMOUNT) FROM PAYMENTS PY WHERE PY.SUBJECT_NO =${C.ENFORCEMENT_NUMBER} AND PY.RD_DATE IS NULL AND PY.ERROR_INDICATOR = 'N' ), 0 ) AS "C.BALANCE" FROM CASES C WHERE C.CASE_NUMBER = ${C.ENFORCEMENT_NUMBER}

SELECT DECODE(COUNT(*),0,'false','true') AS "C.MONEY_IN_COURT" FROM PAYMENTS PY WHERE PY.SUBJECT_NO = ${C.ENFORCEMENT_NUMBER} AND PY.PAYMENT_FOR = 'CASE' AND PY.PASSTHROUGH = 'N' AND PY.RD_DATE IS NULL AND PY.ERROR_INDICATOR = 'N' AND PY.PAYOUT_DATE IS NULL
